field_values.action_summary: After Powell departs, Carter observes suspicious movements in the valley. He tracks what he believes is an Apache ambush, discovering fresh pony tracks that indicate a large presence nearby.
field_values.emotional_beat: From solitude/peace to alertness and growing dread.
field_values.camera_intent: POV shots of the valley; Low-angle tracking shots of Carter on horseback; Close-ups of tracks in the dirt
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Horse movement direction must remain consistent during pursuit
Lighting must shift to reflect passing time during the track
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH001_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish a shift from the isolation of prospecting to the realization of an imminent threat. The sequence must visually communicate the transition from peaceful observation to active tracking and growing dread through environmental cues and character reaction.

## Required Cast
- john_carter

## Required Environments
- arizona_quartz_vein_location
- apache_plateau_trail

## Continuity Constraints
- Horse movement direction must remain consistent during pursuit
- Lighting must shift to reflect passing time during the track

## Beat List
- BT001: Carter observes the valley in solitude
- BT002: Detection of suspicious movement
- BT003: Discovery of pony tracks
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
